staticMethods.name: spawn
staticMethods.description:
Runs `thread` immediately on a new thread. Any extra arguments are passed to it.
Returns the thread so it can be cancelled later with `task.cancel`.

```luau
task.spawn(function(name) print("hello", name) end, "world")
```

params.name: thread
params.description: the function or thread to run

staticMethods.name: defer
staticMethods.description:
Runs `thread` on the next tick. Any extra arguments are passed to it.
Returns the thread so it can be cancelled later.

params.name: thread
params.description: the function or thread to run

staticMethods.name: delay
staticMethods.description:
Runs `thread` after `ticks` ticks. Any extra arguments are passed to it. Returns the
thread so it can be cancelled later.

params.name: ticks
params.description: the number of ticks to wait

params.name: thread
params.description: the function or thread to run

staticMethods.name: wait
staticMethods.description:
Pauses the current thread for `ticks` ticks. Defaults to one tick.

```luau
task.wait(20) -- pause for one second at 20 TPS
```

params.name: ticks
params.description: the number of ticks to wait

staticMethods.name: cancel
staticMethods.description:
Cancels a thread previously returned by `spawn`, `defer`, or `delay`. Returns `true`
if the thread was running and is now cancelled, `false` if it had already finished.

@mapmaker/task.description:
Schedule and manage threads. Run a function on a new thread, defer it to the next tick,
delay it by a number of ticks, pause the current thread, or cancel any of the above.

staticMethods.name: get_block
staticMethods.description:
Returns the block at the given position. Currently returns the block's id as a
string (e.g. `"minecraft:stone"`).

@mapmaker/world.description:
Read and write the world this script is running in. For per-player effects, use
`player.world` instead.

exports.name: Item

getter.description: The item's id.

exports.description: A stack of items. Empty stacks are returned as `nil` rather than an `Item`.

staticMethods.name: deprecated_make_item_from_material
staticMethods.description: **Deprecated.** Creates an `Item` from a vanilla material key.

exports.name: Player

getter.description: The player's UUID.
The player's username.
The player's current position.
The player's yaw (horizontal rotation), in degrees.
The player's pitch (vertical rotation), in degrees.
The player's sidebar.

The world as the player sees it. Use this to apply effects only this player can
see, like ghost blocks or attached entities.
**Deprecated.** The player's current scale.
Fires when this player hits another player. Receives the player who was hit.
Fires when this player right-clicks a block. Receives the block position.
Fires when this player jumps.
Fires when this player right-clicks while holding an item.

methods.name: send_message
methods.description: Sends a chat message to this player.

methods.name: show_title
methods.description: Shows a title (and optional subtitle) on this player's screen.

methods.name: play_sound
methods.description:
Plays a sound for this player. The sound follows the player as they move.

`options` can include `volume` (0–1), `pitch` (0–2), and `category`.

methods.name: play_sound_at
methods.description: Plays a sound for this player at a specific position. Volume falls off with distance.

methods.name: stop_sound
methods.description:
Stops sounds playing for this player. With no arguments, stops every sound.
Pass `sound` to stop a specific key, `category` to stop a category, or both.

methods.name: teleport
methods.description:
Teleports the player. Yaw and pitch default to the player's current values.

`relative` is a string containing any of the characters `xyzrw` — each one means
that axis is interpreted as an offset from the player's current value rather than
an absolute coordinate. `r` covers yaw, `w` covers pitch.

methods.name: get_slot
methods.description: Returns the item equipped in `slot`, or an empty item if the slot is empty.

methods.name: set_slot
methods.description: Sets the item equipped in `slot`.

methods.name: set_item
methods.description:
Places an item in the player's inventory. Slot indices: hotbar 0–8, main inventory
9–35, armor 36–39, off-hand 40.

methods.name: add_effect
methods.description:
Applies a potion effect to this player. `amplifier` is 1-based — pass `1` for
level I. Duration is in ticks; omit it for an infinite effect.

methods.name: remove_effect
methods.description: Removes an active potion effect from this player.

methods.name: clear_effects
methods.description: Removes all active potion effects from this player.

metaMethods.description: Two `Player` values are equal when they refer to the same player.

exports.description: A player connected to the map.

exports.name: WorldView

methods.name: spawn_entity
methods.description:
Spawns an entity that only this player can see. `init` describes the entity —
`position` is required, plus any of the entity's properties.

Currently only `"text"` (a text display) is supported.

```luau
player.world:spawn_entity("text", {
    position = vector(0, 64, 0),
    text = "<red>only you can see me</red>",
})
```

methods.name: set_block
methods.description:
Sets a block visible only to this player. The actual world is unchanged.

`blockState` accepts a block id with optional state, e.g. `"minecraft:stone"`
or `"minecraft:oak_stairs[facing=north]"`.

exports.description:
The world as seen by a single player. Effects applied here are visible only to that
player.

exports.name: Sidebar

methods.name: set

exports.description: A scoreboard sidebar shown on the right side of the player's screen.

@mapmaker/player.description: The `Player` type and per-player helpers like `Sidebar` and `WorldView`.

getter.description: Fires when a player joins the map.
Fires when a player leaves the map.
Fires when a player lands on the ground after being airborne.

@mapmaker/players.description:
Events that fire across all players in the map.

```luau
local players = require("@mapmaker/players")
players.on_join:listen(function(player)
    player:send_message("welcome, " .. player.name)
end)
```

exports.name: StateDefinition

methods.name: get
methods.description: Returns this player's value for the slot.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Replaces this player's value for the slot.

exports.description: A handle to one named state slot. Returned by `define_state`.

staticMethods.name: define_state
staticMethods.description:
Defines a named state slot. Cache the returned definition at module scope; calling
`define_state` more than once for the same name produces independent slots.

@mapmaker/store.description:
Per-player state storage.

```luau
local store = require("@mapmaker/store")
local stats = store.define_state("stats", { wins = 0, kills = 0 })

players.on_join:listen(function(p)
    local data = stats:get(p)
    p:send_message("welcome back, you have " .. data.wins .. " wins")
end)
```

exports.name: EventSource

methods.name: listen
methods.description: Calls `handler` every time this event fires.

params.name: handler
params.description: the function to run on each event

exports.description:
A stream of events you can subscribe to. Use `:listen` to react every time the event
fires, `:once` to handle just the next one, or `:wait` to pause the current thread
until the next event.

```luau
local players = require("@mapmaker/players")
players.on_join:listen(function(player)
    player:send_message("welcome!")
end)
```

getter.description:
The player this script is attached to. Only valid in player-bound scripts; reading
from a world-bound script raises an error.
The world this script is attached to. Only valid in world-bound scripts.

exports.name: Entity

getter.description: The entity's UUID.
The entity's current position.
The entity's yaw (horizontal rotation), in degrees.
The entity's pitch (vertical rotation), in degrees.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the entity from the world. Has no effect if the entity is already removed.

exports.description: The base type for all entities.

exports.name: Display

getter.description: How the display orients itself toward the player.
The display's scale. Each axis can be set independently. Interpolatable.

methods.name: interpolate
methods.description:
Smoothly transitions properties to new values over `duration` ticks. Only
interpolatable properties can appear in the target table.

```luau
display:interpolate(20, { scale = vector(2, 2, 2) })  -- grow over one second
```

exports.description:
An entity that renders something at its position — usually text, a block, or an
item. Most properties on `Display` and its subtypes can be smoothly animated with
`:interpolate`.

exports.name: TextDisplay

getter.description: The text shown by this display.
Whether the text is rendered with a drop shadow.
The background colour behind the text, as a packed ARGB integer.
The text's opacity, between `0` (fully transparent) and `1` (fully opaque).

exports.description: A display that renders styled text floating in the world.

@mapmaker/entity.description: Entity types. To spawn an entity, call `player.world:spawn_entity(...)`.

exports.name: Text

metaMethods.description: Concatenates two `Text` values, or a `Text` with any string-able value.
Returns the length of the rendered plain text, ignoring formatting.
Returns the plain-text form, without any formatting.

exports.description:
A piece of styled text. Built with `Text.new`, accepted anywhere the API takes a
message or label.

staticMethods.name: new
staticMethods.description:
Parses a MiniMessage-formatted string into a `Text`. Always escape user input with
`Text.sanitize` first to prevent unintended formatting.

```luau
local greeting = Text.new("<red>welcome!</red>")
player:send_message(greeting)
```

staticMethods.name: sanitize
staticMethods.description:
Escapes any MiniMessage tags in a string. Use this before passing user-supplied text
to `Text.new` to prevent injected formatting.

```luau
local safe = Text.sanitize(player_input)
player:send_message(Text.new("you said: " .. safe))
```

globals.description:
Build and manipulate styled text. `Text` values can be passed anywhere the API accepts a
message, title, or label. Available as a global named `Text`, without `require`.

getter.description: The server version.
The short commit hash of the running build.
The server's size class.
How long the server has been running, in seconds.
Hot-reload controls.

globals.description:
Information about the server this script is running on. Available as a global named
`runtime`, without `require`.

local lib = require("./init")

export type Entity = {
	read uuid: string,
	read position: vector,
	read yaw: number,
	read pitch: number,

}

export type Display = Entity & {
	read billboard: "fixed" | "vertical" | "horizontal" | "center",
	write billboard: "fixed" | "vertical" | "horizontal" | "center",
	read scale: vector,
	write scale: vector,
	read interpolate: (self: Display, duration: number, properties: { [string]: any }) -> (),
}

export type TextDisplay = Display & {
	read text: lib.Text,
	write text: AnyText,
	read shadow: boolean,
	write shadow: boolean,
	read background: number,
	write background: number,
	read opacity: number,
	write opacity: number,
}

return {}
